lead: This machine uses cz, bonus, suru, and reset. Pick the current route first, then read the checker.

summaryBoxes.label: Base plan
summaryBoxes.value: Keep cz, bonus, suru, and reset on separate lines.

factTable: Do not mix the four routes.

sections.title: How to use
body: The selected route changes the checker output.
Fix the route first, then compare the result card and the summary table.

sections.title: Memo
body: This machine has many entry points, so vague reading causes the biggest error.
When the route is unclear, stay on the safer side.
